name: Apricot-Carrot Salad with Grapefruit Mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dressing: In a small mixing bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of lime juice with red wine vinegar. Add ground cumin, sugar, salt, and white pepper to taste. Whisk in the peanut oil until an emulsion forms. Blend in grated ginger, minced garlic, and chopped grapefruit mint. Let the mixture sit for 30 minutes.
2. Peel and shred carrots using a grater or food processor attachment. Place them in a large mixing bowl with dried apricots.
3. Add dressing to the salad and toss until well coated.
4. Spoon the salad onto chilled romaine lettuce leaves and serve.
